title: About
text:
Education

B.S. in Mathematics, University of Nebraska-Omaha, 2020-2023

title: About
text:
Research Interests
Broadly speaking, I am interested in the applications of mathematical analysis, topology, and geometry in quantitative finance. Some specific topics of interest are:

Information geometry
\(H^\infty\) optimization
Numerical methods for free-boundary partial differential equations

title: Your Name
text:
I’m a first year PhD student interested in the applications of complex analysis and differential geometry to quantitative finance.
I write about these topics on my blog.
